'''babacha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fibercraft|fibercraft]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-b-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fibercraft|fibercraft]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| babacha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || bæbæchæth || bæbæchæj || bæbæchæsh || bæbæchæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || bababachath || bababachaj || bababachash || bababacha
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || babachath || babachaj || babachash || babacha
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || babafchafth || babafchafj || babafchafsh || babafchaf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || babachatha || babachaja || babachasha || babachaka
|-
| [[Patient]] || babachath || babachaj || babachash || babacha
|-
| [[Possessive]] || babachathal || babachajal || babachashal || babachakal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || babachaathatha || babachaajaja || babachaashasha || babachaaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || babachathan || babachajan || babachashan || babachakan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || babachathaoro || babachajaoro || babachashaoro || babachakaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
